## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `uv run pytest` passes locally
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (FastMCP only); `uv.lock` updated if deps changed
- [ ] Every new tool result still carries the `_meta` block; responses are deterministic
- [ ] Targets the `main` branch
- [ ] I did **not** bump the version or edit release/deploy workflows (maintainer handles releases)
